member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalValue
member.summary: A value is either defined or undefined.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Memory.mem
member.summary: Store memory contents (byte-level).

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Labels
member.summary: Store labels of LowUIR statements.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.IgnoreUndef@
member.summary: Whether to ignore statements that cannot be evaluated due to undef values. This is particularly useful to quickly check some constants.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.InPrematureState@
member.summary: Indicate whether we are in an abnormal state. If so, the rest of the evaluation should be aborted. This flag should never be set in normal situation.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.IsInstrTerminated@
member.summary: Indicate whether to terminate the current instruction or not. This flag is set to true when we encounter an inter-jump statement, so that we can ignore the rest of the statements.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Callbacks@
member.summary: Callback functions.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Memory@
member.summary: Memory.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Contexts@
member.summary: Per-thread context.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.ThreadId@
member.summary: The current thread ID. We use thread IDs starting from zero. We assign new thread IDs by incrementing it by one at a time. The first thread is 0, the second is 1, and so on.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.ThreadId(System.Int32)
member.summary: The current thread ID. We use thread IDs starting from zero. We assign new thread IDs by incrementing it by one at a time. The first thread is 0, the second is 1, and so on.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.PC(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Current PC.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.IsInstrTerminated(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Indicate whether to terminate the current instruction or not. This flag is set to true when we encounter an inter-jump statement, so that we can ignore the rest of the statements.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.InPrematureState(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Indicate whether we are in an abnormal state. If so, the rest of the evaluation should be aborted. This flag should never be set in normal situation.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Contexts(B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context[])
member.summary: Per-thread context.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.ThreadId
member.summary: The current thread ID. We use thread IDs starting from zero. We assign new thread IDs by incrementing it by one at a time. The first thread is 0, the second is 1, and so on.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.PC
member.summary: Current PC.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Memory
member.summary: Memory.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.IsInstrTerminated
member.summary: Indicate whether to terminate the current instruction or not. This flag is set to true when we encounter an inter-jump statement, so that we can ignore the rest of the statements.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.InPrematureState
member.summary: Indicate whether we are in an abnormal state. If so, the rest of the evaluation should be aborted. This flag should never be set in normal situation.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.IgnoreUndef
member.summary: Whether to ignore statements that cannot be evaluated due to undef values. This is particularly useful to quickly check some constants.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetPC
member.summary: Get the program counter (PC).

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Contexts
member.summary: Per-thread context.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.Callbacks
member.summary: Callback functions.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.UnsetTmp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Unset the given temporary variable.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.UnsetReg(System.Int32)
member.summary: Unset the given register.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.TryGetTmp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the value of the given temporary variable.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.TryGetReg(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the value of the given register.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.StartInstr
member.summary: Start evaluating the instruction.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.SetTmp(System.Int32,B2R2.BitVector)
member.summary: Set the value for the given temporary variable.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.SetReg(System.Int32,B2R2.BitVector)
member.summary: Set the value for the given register.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.SetPC(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Set the program counter (PC).

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.SetMode(B2R2.ArchOperationMode)
member.summary: Set the architecture operation mode.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.PrepareInstrEval(B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt[])
member.summary: Get ready for evaluating an instruction.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.PrepareContext``1(System.Int32,System.UInt64,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.Tuple{System.Int32,``0}})
member.summary: Prepare the initial context of the given thread id (tid). This function will set the current thread to be tid.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.NextStmt
member.summary: Update the current statement index to be the next (current + 1) statement.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GoToLabel(System.Tuple{System.String,System.Int32})
member.summary: Go to the statement of the given label.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetTmp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the value of the given temporary variable.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetReg(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the value of the given register.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetMode
member.summary: Get the current architecture operation mode.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetCurrentContext
member.summary: Get the current context of the current thread.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.GetContext(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the context of a specific thread.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.ContextSwitch(System.Int32)
member.summary: Thread context switch. If the given thread ID does not exist, we create a new context for it.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.CleanUp
member.summary: Delete temporary states variables and get ready for evaluating the next block of isntructions.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState.AbortInstr
member.summary: Stop evaluating further statements of the current instruction, and move on the next instruction.

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState
member.summary: The main evaluation state that will be updated by evaluating every statement encountered during the course of execution.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.StmtEvalEventHandler@
member.summary: Statement evaluation event handler.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.SideEffectEventHandler@
member.summary: Side-effect event handler.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.PutEventHandler@
member.summary: Put event handler. The first parameter is PC, and the second is the value that is put to the destination.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.StoreEventHandler@
member.summary: Memory store event handler.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.LoadEventHandler@
member.summary: Memory load event handler.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.PerInstrHandler@
member.summary: Per-instruction handler.

member.summary: Memory store event handler.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.StmtEvalEventHandler(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit})
member.summary: Statement evaluation event handler.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalCallBacks.SideEffectEventHandler(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{B2R2.BinIR.SideEffect,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit}})
member.summary: Side-effect event handler.

member.summary: Put event handler. The first parameter is PC, and the second is the value that is put to the destination.

member.summary: Per-instruction handler.

member.summary: Memory load event handler.

member.summary: Statement evaluation event handler.

member.summary: Side-effect event handler.

member.summary: Put event handler. The first parameter is PC, and the second is the value that is put to the destination.

member.summary: Memory load event handler.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Mode@
member.summary: Architecture mode.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Labels@
member.summary: Store labels and their corresponding statement indices.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Temporaries@
member.summary: Store temporary variable values.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Registers@
member.summary: Store named register values.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.PC@
member.summary: The current program counter.

member.name: F:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.StmtIdx@
member.summary: The current index of the statement to evaluate within the scope of a machine instruction. This index behaves like a PC for statements of an instruction.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.StmtIdx(System.Int32)
member.summary: The current index of the statement to evaluate within the scope of a machine instruction. This index behaves like a PC for statements of an instruction.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.PC(System.UInt64)
member.summary: The current program counter.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Mode(B2R2.ArchOperationMode)
member.summary: Architecture mode.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Temporaries
member.summary: Store temporary variable values.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.StmtIdx
member.summary: The current index of the statement to evaluate within the scope of a machine instruction. This index behaves like a PC for statements of an instruction.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Registers
member.summary: Store named register values.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.PC
member.summary: The current program counter.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Mode
member.summary: Architecture mode.

member.name: P:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Context.Labels
member.summary: Store labels and their corresponding statement indices.

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.InvalidMemException
member.summary: Raised when an invalid memory access.

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.UndefExpException
member.summary: Raised when undefined expression is encountered.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.SafeEvaluator.evalBlock(B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState,System.UInt64,System.Int32,B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt[][])
member.summary: Evaluate a block of statements. The block may represent a machine instruction, or a basic block.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.SafeEvaluator.evalStmts(B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt[],Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpResult{B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState,B2R2.ErrorCase})
member.summary: Evaluate a sequence of statements, which is lifted from a single instruction.

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.SafeEvaluator
member.summary: ConcEval.SafeEvaluator is a safe concrete evaluation module for LowUIR. Unlike ConcEval.Evaluator, it does not raise exceptions, but it is slower than ConcEval.Evaluator.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Evaluator.evalBlock(B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState,System.UInt64,System.Int32,B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt[][])
member.summary: Evaluate a block of statements. The block represents a series of lifted IR statements from one or more machine instructions.

member.name: M:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Evaluator.evalStmts(B2R2.BinIR.LowUIR.Stmt[],B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.EvalState)
member.summary: Evaluate a sequence of statements, which is lifted from a single instruction.

member.name: T:B2R2.MiddleEnd.ConcEval.Evaluator
member.summary: ConcEval.Evaluator is a concrete evaluation module for LowUIR.
